description: Bijective map from extracted topology tuple (n, g, s, w, r) to loop-class lemma. Derived from data/loop_class_library.json (10 lemma classes + 1 tree-level entry). Each entry lists the canonical loop-class factors at sign=+1 and sign=-1; the predictor selects the sign from the YAML's parity.expected_sign field.

tuple_components.s: sync coupling channel symbol; one of '0' | 'eps^2' | 'eps^2 pure' | 'eps^2 * gamma'

tree_class.name: Tree-level (no loop dressing)
tree_class.physics: Tree-level closure with no loop correction. The observable's tree formula reaches the target without applying any loop-class factor.

classes.name: Yukawa-Damping
classes.physics: Single-spinor self-Wick contraction at d=4 spinor-trace normalisation, multiplied by the System-R Yukawa damping coefficient gamma.

classes.name: PMNS-Self-Energy
classes.physics: Double-Wick contraction in the lepton-mixing self-energy.

classes.name: Resummed-Propagator
classes.physics: Geometric-series resummation of the L3 self-energy class. Four variants: direct +, direct -, inverse +, inverse - (the inverse forms correspond to propagator-resummed observables such as T_RH).

classes.name: Generation
classes.physics: Generation-mixing channel with full N_gen support.

classes.name: Sub-Generation
classes.physics: Single-generation sub-channel; suppresses by 1/(2 N_gen) relative to the generation channel.

classes.name: EW-Mixed
classes.physics: Electroweak-mixed channel coupling the Yukawa class to the sync-coupling eps_sync^2.

classes.name: Pure-Sync
classes.physics: Pure sync-coupling class with no spinor-trace content.

classes.name: Sync-x-Gamma
classes.physics: Sync-coupling multiplied by gamma (eps_sync^2 = gamma/2 gives gamma^2/2).
